features: Sure Original Antiperspirant Deodorant Roll On has been developed to give you cutting-edge protection against sweat and odour
This roll on deodorant features our unique MotionSense technology to give you an all-day classic fragrance with spicy and woody notes – the more you move, the more it protects
To keep sweat and odour at bay, ensure your underarms are dry before applying the roll on in circular motions, checking coverage is even on both underarms
Get all-day freshness and 48-hour protection from sweat and odour with our antiperspirant deodorant for men
This antiperspirant roll on is alcohol free* and suitable for everyday use
With Sure Original Antiperspirant Deodorant Roll On you’re always protected, so you can feel confident whatever happens –Sure, it won’t let you down
description: Product Description Every second counts, whether you’re running late or running to beat your personal best. Nothing should distract you from your focus – especially not sweat. Sure Original Antiperspirant Deodorant Roll On features an alcohol-free* formula that provides 48-hour protection against sweat and odour, so you can feel fresh, dry and protected all day without worrying about irritation. This antiperspirant deodorant for men uses Sure’s innovative MotionSense technology to release bursts of clean, fresh fragrance when you need it most. It works like this: unique microcapsules sit on the surface of your skin. When you move, friction breaks those microcapsules, releasing more fragrance. So, the more you move, the more it protects. Whether you’re working hard in the office, playing hard out and about or just meeting up with friends, that classic masculine scent stays with you no matter how hard you push yourself. When you work hard, Sure works harder. Grab it to get all-day freshness and 48-hour protection that works in sync with your body. Before applying, ensure your underarms are dry. Roll on in circular motions, checking coverage is even on both underarms. Avoid contact with eyes and broken skin. Sure gives you all the backup you need. Sure: it won’t let you down. *ethyl alcohol Ingredients Aqua, Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate, Steareth-2, Helianthus Annuus Seed Oil, Steareth-20, Parfum, Calcium Chloride, Glycine, Disodium EDTA, Pentaerythrityl Tetra-di-t-butyl Hydroxyhydrocinnamate, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Benzoate, Benzyl Salicylate, Citronellol, Geraniol, Hexyl Cinnamal, Limonene, Linalool.
